Description
io.apicurio.datamodels.validation.rules.required
 

  • Uses of RequiredPropertyValidationRule in io.apicurio.datamodels.validation.rules.required

    Subclasses of RequiredPropertyValidationRule in io.apicurio.datamodels.validation.rules.required
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AaMissingAsyncApiPropertyRule
    Rule: AAD-001 Validates that AsyncAPI documents have the required 'asyncapi' property specifying the version.
    class 
    AaMissingChannelAddressRule
    Rule: CHAN-001 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Channel entities have the required 'address' property.
    class 
    AaMissingChannelsPropertyRule
    Rule: AAD-003 Validates that AsyncAPI 2.x documents have the required 'channels' property.
    class 
    AaMissingCorrelationIdLocationRule
     
    class 
    AaMissingOperationActionRule
    Rule: AAO-001 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation has a required 'action' property.
    class 
    AaMissingOperationChannelReferenceRule
    Rule: AAO-002 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation has a required 'channel' reference.
    class 
    AaMissingParameterLocationRule
    Implements the Missing Parameter Location rule for AsyncAPI 2.x.
    class 
    AaMissingParameterSchemaRule
    Implements the Missing Parameter Schema rule for AsyncAPI 2.x.
    class 
    AaMissingSchemaDefinitionRule
    Implements the Missing Schema Definition rule for AsyncAPI 3.x MultiFormatSchema.
    class 
    AaMissingServerHostRule
    Rule: SRV-005 Validates that a Server has a 'host' property in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AasMissingServerProtocolRule
     
    class 
    MissingApiInformationRule
    Validates that API documents have the required 'info' property.
